content:
🌟 face_looker | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: Creating engaging and interactive UI elements such as portfolio headers, avatars, or dynamic visual components.
✨ Key Features: • Generate AI-powered face images with varying gaze directions • Create interactive React components that follow cursor movement • Option to use a Replicate model for easy generation • Option to use a Python script for advanced control over generation • Generates a sprite/grid sheet of faces
📖 Summary: Face Looker generates AI-powered gaze-tracking face images and provides an interactive React component that makes a face follow the user's cursor in real-time. It offers two methods for image generation: an easy-to-use Replicate model and a more advanced Python script for greater control.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
